jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Firstcry - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Firstcry. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Marketplace Manager to strengthen our Noida-based team.

About Firstcry:
Firstcry is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in A/B Testing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Firstcry!
